Package nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.excel

package nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.excel
Implements Excel-based report generation support.

This package handles spreadsheet template writing and workbook-oriented report output for bookkeeping reporting needs.

Responsibilities:

  • Generate spreadsheet report artifacts.
  • Apply template-driven workbook transformations.
  • Support export workflows targeting Excel formats.
Since:
1.0
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    nonprofitbookkeeping.reports
    Coordinates report services and report-level abstractions.
    nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.datasource
    Provides data-source query abstractions for reports.
    nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper
    Provides JasperReports integration entry points.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    ExcelTemplateWriter
    Writes report values into a pre-existing XLSX template using field map metadata.
    ExcelWorkbookPageReportService
    Writes a single workbook page using a field translation map and report data.
